user_focus: Add five more iterations to the agentic improvement loop for exam-bank output integrity.
actual_improvements: Added a suspicious-crop review-pack generator and CLI command that samples ranked audit candidates into a static review pack.
Added a real repository PDF regression for 13winter11_q10 proving the mark-scheme crop excludes earlier q9 material.
Added audit detection for mark_scheme_text lines that start with a different known question number from the same paper.
Reduced text-label false positives by filtering detected labels against the paper's known question numbers.
Added summary buckets and ranked review candidates for mark_scheme_text foreign-label failures.
evidence: Real-PDF regression added in tests/test_sample_pipeline.py for 2011 winter paper 13 question 10.
Final audit unit test run for this cycle: tests/test_audit.py passed with 14 tests.
fake_progress: Most live output artifacts remain unrepaired; the cycle mainly improved detection, triage, and one regression lock.
The suspicious-crop review pack links to existing images and does not itself classify or fix them.
Foreign-label review candidates are ranked evidence, not proof that every record is semantically wrong.
bloat_introduced: src/exam_bank/audit.py gained focused helpers for mark_scheme_text foreign-label detection, filtering, summaries, and candidates.
cleanup_required: Decide separately whether run artifacts under .agent-runs should be tracked or archived.
Inspect and repair the remaining 30 suspicious rendered crop candidates.
Inspect and repair the remaining 22 mark_scheme_text foreign-label candidates.
agent_failure_patterns: One exploratory probe was accidentally run against the default output root before being rerun into the iteration folder; this likely regenerated output/pm1/pm1_2011_w11_13_ms_q10_markscheme.png.
The cycle still leaves current output-integrity-audit exiting 1 by design because known live output failures remain.
acceptance_criteria_pattern_that_worked_: Each iteration used a narrow failing test or live audit artifact, then recorded implementation and audit evidence in the iteration folder.
next_cycle_focus: Use the review pack to visually classify the top suspicious crop candidates.
Repair high-confidence stale mark_scheme_text candidates, starting with records that include several foreign labels.
Rerun output-integrity-audit after repairs and track counts until both suspicious crop and foreign-label failures decline.
what_agent_1_should_stop_doing: Do not add more ranking metadata before using the existing ranked candidates to repair output.
Do not run exploratory sample generation without explicitly setting a run-local output root.
planner_policy_edits: No planner policy edits were made this cycle.
